mapper.select: select r.id, r.subject_id, r.device_id, s.subject_name, s.subject_age, d.device_name, r.collection_time, r.sample_rate, r.status, r.remark from bcg_data_record r left join bcg_subject s on r.subject_id = s.id left join bcg_device d on r.device_id = d.id order by r.collection_time desc

select r.id, r.subject_id, r.device_id, s.subject_name, s.subject_age, d.device_name, r.collection_time, r.sample_rate, r.status, r.remark from bcg_data_record r left join bcg_subject s on r.subject_id = s.id left join bcg_device d on r.device_id = d.id where r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into bcg_data_record (subject_id, device_id, collection_time, sample_rate, status, create_time,file_url) values (#{subjectId}, #{deviceId}, #{collectionTime}, #{sampleRate}, #{status}, sysdate(),#{fileUrl})
mapper.update:
UPDATE bcg_data_record
subject_id = #{subjectId}, device_id = #{deviceId}, collection_time = #{collectionTime}, sample_rate = #{sampleRate}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, status = #{status}, heart_rate = #{heartRate}, hrv_sdnn = #{hrvSdnn}, resp_rate = #{respRate}, body_movement = #{bodyMovement}, sleep_status = #{sleepStatus}, health_score = #{healthScore}, remark = #{remark}, process_duration = #{processDuration},
report_status = #{reportStatus}, report_time = #{reportTime}, report_file_url = #{reportFileUrl},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT s.id AS subjectId, s.subject_name AS subjectName FROM bcg_subject s
SELECT id, collection_time AS collectionTime, heart_rate AS heartRate FROM bcg_data_record WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY collection_time DESC

SELECT heart_rate AS heartRate, hrv_sdnn AS hrvSdnn, resp_rate AS respRate, body_movement AS bodyMovement, sleep_status AS sleepStatus, health_score AS healthScore FROM bcg_data_record WHERE id = #{id}

select r.id, r.subject_id, r.device_id, r.file_url, s.subject_name, s.subject_age, d.device_name, r.collection_time, r.sample_rate, r.status, r.remark from bcg_data_record r left join bcg_subject s on r.subject_id = s.id left join bcg_device d on r.device_id = d.id where r.id = #{id}
select subject_age from bcg_subject where id = #{subjectId}
select id, subject_id, status, heart_rate, file_url from bcg_data_record where id = #{id}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(collection_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dateStr, ROUND(AVG(heart_rate), 1) AS avgHr, ROUND(AVG(health_score), 0) AS avgScore FROM bcg_data_record WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND status = 1 AND heart_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(collection_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY dateStr DESC LIMIT #{days} ) t ORDER BY t.dateStr ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM bcg_data_record WHERE status = 1

SELECT r.id, s.subject_age, r.heart_rate, r.hrv_sdnn, r.resp_rate, r.body_movement, r.health_score FROM bcg_data_record r LEFT JOIN bcg_subject s ON r.subject_id = s.id WHERE r.status = 1 AND r.heart_rate IS NOT NULL

SELECT r.id AS id, r.subject_id AS subjectId, r.device_id AS deviceId, s.subject_name AS subjectName, s.subject_age AS subjectAge, d.device_name AS deviceName, r.collection_time AS collectionTime, r.sample_rate AS sampleRate, r.status AS status, r.remark AS remark,
r.file_url AS fileUrl,
r.heart_rate AS heartRate, r.hrv_sdnn AS hrvSdnn, r.resp_rate AS respRate, r.body_movement AS bodyMovement, r.sleep_status AS sleepStatus, r.health_score AS healthScore,
r.report_status AS reportStatus, r.report_time AS reportTime, r.report_file_url AS reportFileUrl
FROM bcg_data_record r LEFT JOIN bcg_subject s ON r.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN bcg_device d ON r.device_id = d.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.id AS recordId, s.id AS userId, s.subject_name AS userName, s.subject_age AS userAge, r.collection_time AS collectionTime, r.sample_rate AS sampleRate, 1 AS alarmType, CASE WHEN r.heart_rate > 100 THEN 1 ELSE -1 END AS alarmDirection, CONCAT(ROUND(r.heart_rate, 1), ' 次/分') AS alarmValue, '心率超出正常范围(60-100次/分)' AS alarmDesc FROM bcg_data_record r LEFT JOIN bcg_subject s ON r.subject_id = s.id WHERE r.status = 1 AND (r.heart_rate < 60 OR r.heart_rate > 100)
UNION ALL
SELECT r.id, s.id, s.subject_name, s.subject_age, r.collection_time, r.sample_rate, 2 AS alarmType, CASE WHEN r.hrv_sdnn > 150 THEN 1 ELSE -1 END AS alarmDirection, CONCAT(ROUND(r.hrv_sdnn, 1), ' ms'), '心率变异性超出正常范围(50-150ms)' FROM bcg_data_record r LEFT JOIN bcg_subject s ON r.subject_id = s.id WHERE r.status = 1 AND (r.hrv_sdnn < 50 OR r.hrv_sdnn > 150)
UNION ALL
SELECT r.id, s.id, s.subject_name, s.subject_age, r.collection_time, r.sample_rate, 3 AS alarmType, 2 AS alarmDirection, '不规则', '检测到节律波动异常，心律不规则' FROM bcg_data_record r LEFT JOIN bcg_subject s ON r.subject_id = s.id WHERE r.status = 1 AND (r.hrv_sdnn < 50 OR r.hrv_sdnn > 150)
UNION ALL
SELECT r.id, s.id, s.subject_name, s.subject_age, r.collection_time, r.sample_rate, 4 AS alarmType, CASE WHEN r.resp_rate > 20 THEN 1 ELSE -1 END AS alarmDirection, CONCAT(ROUND(r.resp_rate, 1), ' 次/分'), '呼吸频率超出正常范围(12-20次/分)' FROM bcg_data_record r LEFT JOIN bcg_subject s ON r.subject_id = s.id WHERE r.status = 1 AND (r.resp_rate < 12 OR r.resp_rate > 20)
UNION ALL
SELECT r.id, s.id, s.subject_name, s.subject_age, r.collection_time, r.sample_rate, 5 AS alarmType, 1 AS alarmDirection, CONCAT(r.body_movement, ' 次/小时'), '体动过于频繁(正常范围0-5次/小时)' FROM bcg_data_record r LEFT JOIN bcg_subject s ON r.subject_id = s.id WHERE r.status = 1 AND r.body_movement > 5
UNION ALL
SELECT r.id, s.id, s.subject_name, s.subject_age, r.collection_time, r.sample_rate, 6 AS alarmType, -1 AS alarmDirection, CONCAT(r.health_score, ' 分'), '综合评分偏低，睡眠质量欠佳(健康标准≥80分)' FROM bcg_data_record r LEFT JOIN bcg_subject s ON r.subject_id = s.id WHERE r.status = 1 AND r.health_score < 80 ) t
AND t.userId = #{userId} AND t.userName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND t.alarmType = #{alarmType}
ORDER BY t.collectionTime DESC
